ddls:
CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data version */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for the score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score data */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Level of social support */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy */,
  "freedom_to_make_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption index */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey or study */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the survey or study */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error associated with the happiness score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_version" (
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the data version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country or region */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region in which the country is located */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey or study */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey or study */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey or study */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used in the survey or study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "study_description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "research_methodology" TEXT /* Research methodology used in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's affiliated institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* User's job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, dataset access, report generation) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* Report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_metrics" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for GDP metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the GDP data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_support_metrics" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for social support metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the social support data */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Level of social support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_support_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_expectancy_metrics" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for health expectancy metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the health expectancy data */,
  "healthy_life_expectancy" REAL /* Healthy life expectancy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_expectancy_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedom_metrics" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for freedom metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the freedom data */,
  "freedom_to_make_choices" REAL /* Freedom to make life choices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedom_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosity_metrics" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for generosity metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the generosity data */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosity_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corruption_metrics" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for corruption metrics */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the corruption data */,
  "perceptions_of_corruption" REAL /* Perceptions of corruption index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corruption_metrics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the happiness data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
